name: Media Buying Performance Diagnosis
description: Explain what changed in paid media performance and recommend what to do next.
whenToUse: Use this when you want to explain what changed in paid media performance and recommend what to do next.
Best for growth and paid media teams that want repeatable work without changing the tools they already use.

stages.title: Orient From Performance Context
stages.summary: Read the review scope, metric targets, recent snapshots, related learnings, and active experiments.

stages.title: Fetch Additional Metrics
stages.summary: Execute only approved read actions that the concrete plan grants for missing evidence.

stages.title: Diagnose Drivers
stages.summary: Compare evidence against targets and separate likely channel, audience, creative, landing page, and budget drivers.

stages.title: Record Followups
stages.summary: Store recommended follow-up resources, budget review notes, and learning candidates.
